title: Quantitative Trader Intern
description: Work alongside experienced traders to solve complex problems in a fast-paced environment. Competitive compensation and deep learning curve.

title: Quantitative Researcher
description: Build predictive models and high-performance trading strategies using massive datasets and cutting-edge technology.

title: International Quant Championship
description: A global competition to build the best predictive signals (alphas). Top performers gain access to consulting roles.
